chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5899 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.451/2025. 2. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 14.01.2025 Mr. Rashid Mahar, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Sara Malkani, Assistant Attorney General. Per learned counsel, object of the petition has been served, therefore, petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Contempt notice issued earlier stands discharged. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
